overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Conservative Buffer ETF - October (QCOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holding period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral QCOC was launched on Oct 18, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
